Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100 natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 220
programme.desc: Promotes and Enhances Liver Health with Thomson Livrin!

programme.title: Sour, Salty & Alive - EP 7
programme.desc: Savoury, sour, pungent and very much alive. Welcome to the delicious world of ferments from Asia. Fermentation is not just a way to preserve food, it's our gastronomic identity. From Japan to South Korea, and the Philippines to New Zealand, the bounty from the forests, fields and sea are pickled, preserved, and altered by microbes and good bacteria. This series is all about the magic of fermentation - celebrating culinary wisdom, culture and history.

programme.title: Foodie Sisters S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Foodie Sisters Xiao and May embarked on a food challenge to bring viewers to different corner of Taiwan in search of good tasting food from places like Keelong, Xinzhu and Taoyuan.

programme.title: The Land of Spirits - EP 2
programme.desc: The Chinese white dolphin, a marine mammal at the top of the ocean food chain, lives in China’s coastal shallows around 10 meters deep one of the few cetaceans in the world that inhabit such shallow waters. Every lunar March, when fishermen honor Mazu, the dolphins become most active. Believed to fend off sharks, they’re seen as Mazu’s incarnation, earning the name Mazu Fish".

programme.title: Miss Monte Cristo - EP 57
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Korean) This is a suspenseful revenge drama about a woman whose life was destroyed by the friends she trusted most. After making up her mind to take revenge on those who betrayed her, she returns to reclaim the life that was stolen from her.

programme.title: Miss Monte Cristo - EP 58

programme.title: My Sassy Wedding - EP 18
programme.desc: (Dual Language Mandarin and Thai) KangLan has no choice but to lie to her father that she has married Kun YiLing. GangJie's appearance in TongAi City causes Kun YiLing to feel extreme jealousy.

programme.title: News Tonight - EP 341
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Ibu Tanpa Surga Di Telapak Kakinya
programme.desc: Several young, beautiful girls exit the casting room, and the casting committee calls the next names to enter. When Vandra’s (Shanice Margaretha) name is called, she is nowhere to be seen. The committee is confused and eventually calls the next participants. Anggi (Kaemita Boediono) emerges from the restroom, frantically searching for her daughter Vandra, and pleads with the committee to let her daughter follow. The committee agrees to wait for one more hour before the casting closes.

programme.title: Jarang Online Tapi On My Heart
programme.desc: Nada (Masaji Wijayanto) pergi meninggalkan rumah. Melody (Larasati Nugroho) merasa bingung untuk melakukan apalagi agar bisa menyelamatkan rumah tangganya. Melody mendatangi paranormal. Tak tanggung-tanggung, Melody meminta untuk tukar tambah Nada dengan sosok yang lebih baik. Ia juga ingin kembali ke masa lalu. Meski kesal, sang paranormal menuruti keinginan si wanita tersebut hingga ia merapal mantra hingga si perempuan masuk ke portal waktu dan terlempar ke masa lalu.

programme.title: Terbangun Dari Mati Suri
programme.desc: The married couple Firman (Andrew Andhika) and Siska (Sarah Samantha), known as gold store burglars, attempt another heist that afternoon. However, their crime fails completely when a new store visitor notices them. Firman and his accomplices flee to save themselves and scatter. Firman runs toward his motorcycle and accidentally hits a child, Nina (Najla), who had just left the store with her mother. Firman almost yells at Nina, but Siska quickly grabs his hand and drags him away.

programme.title: Jangan Spam Cinta di Hatiku
programme.desc: Mika memiliki pacar yang tampan. Namun suka marah-marah, hal ini membuat Mika amat kesal. Seperti saat hari hujan turun, di mana sang pacar marah kepada Mika, karena tidak mau naik ke dalam mobil dan memilih sepeda motor, sehingga mereka tidak dapat melakukan perjalanan. Lalu mika pun akhirnya putus dengan sang pacar, dan membuatnya harus merasa tersakiti dan berusaha tampil semaksimal mungkin, karena baru putus! Sehingga dia harus tampil keren.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 122

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati

But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 70
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TELOLET CINTA DI ANGKOT NO 28
programme.desc: Ridwan (Naufal Samudra) is the lead singer of the band Rocker. Ridwan left home because he didn't want his mother to arrange his marriage. Ridwan also ran away from debt collectors and went to a village. One day, Ridwan disguised himself as Rimba and met Anty (Yuki Kato), a girl with a free-spirited lifestyle. Ridwan worked as a driver for Abah Bahri's minibus and lived with him, coincidentally Abah Bahri was Anty's father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 122
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Because she felt comfortable, Alexa complained about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complained about his family's economic condition which was in shortage and desperately needed money. Suddenly Alexa has an idea for Darman to kidnap Alexa and ask her father for ransom.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 576
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: WASIAT EYANG BIKIN BAPER SO HARD
programme.desc: Dito accidentally met Ajeng, who was on her way to Jakarta to look for work. Feeling sorry for her, Dito ended up hiring Ajeng as a domestic helper and to take care of his grandmother at home.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 71
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SUMPAH I LOVE YOU FULL
programme.desc: Blaming arranged marriages after witnessing her aunt's divorce, Putri vowed never to be set up in one herself. On her first day at work, Putri didn't make a good impression; instead, she scolded a director at the company where she worked named Riko. Riko deliberately gave Putri a lot of work to do. When he got home, Riko was shocked to find out that the person he had been working with was Boi's daughter, a colleague of his parents who was being arranged to marry him.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 123
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a hick girl. Dara comes to Jakarta to find her biological mother, but instead she meets Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza is apparently told by Eyang, to make Dara his wife, even though Eza has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 123

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Siska (Ersya Aurelia) was asked by Daniel to be able to cook, because Daniel's family has a restaurant business and his mother gave a condition that Daniel's wife must be good at cooking. Siska finally asks Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex who is a chef and has a culinary business, for help.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her partner, Dodo, received a mandate, namely someone who left a luxury car in their office for 2 weeks. Then Intan and Dodo planned to take the car back home. Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in his hometown. Intan claims to be a rich man. On the other hand, Dodo claims to be the owner of the car and flirts with girls in the village, even though Dodo is actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: Asap Neng Sate Bau-Bau Cinta
programme.desc: Bintang is willing to replace Doni to be matched for money but Bintang (Eza Gionino) is surprised, because the girl who was matched with Doni his boss was Alya (Jenniver Eve) the satay seller, who has always not gotten along with him.

In the meantime, we will discover a spectacular colony of one hundred and fifty Greater Mouse-eared Bats in the attic of a church.

programme.title: A Travers Champs - EP 6
programme.desc: The way we treat and feed animals is increasingly being taken into account in buying decisions. Many producers are consequently doing everything possible to provide the best living conditions to their livestock.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 4

programme.title: Marianne - EP 3
programme.desc: At a pet fair, Lucie, a young home help and volunteer worker at the local animal refuge is found dead following an anaphylactic shock. But everything points to murder. Very quickly, the investigation puts Marianne and her team on the trail of animal traffickers.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 4
programme.desc: Jade, lead dancer in a cabaret, is found dead in a rubbish bin behind the night club. The ambitious Naomi, her main rival, is prime suspect. But Marianne also takes a close interest in Prudence, previously employed as a child-minder by the victim before being sacked for obscure reasons.

programme.title: La Peinture Francaise Autour Du Monde - EP 4
programme.desc: At the heart of the Philadelphia Museum of Art hang works by leading impressionist painters, such as Manet, Degas, Sisley, Monet, Morisot, Renoir and Pissarro.

programme.title: La Menace
programme.desc: With his mistress, Dominique, Henry runs a transport company which she owns. In love with the beautiful Julie, Henry is about to leave her. Furious, Dominique violently confronts her rival then commits suicide. The police conclude that it's murder. Julie, accused by everyone, is arrested...
November 2030. It's 48°C in the classroom. Impossible to do any teaching.

programme.title: Elles - EP 1
programme.desc: In Paris, Sarahmee plays a football match with the members of Little Miss Soccer, seeking to make a name for themselves on the city's football pitches. She participates in a race to combat street harassment and goes fly posting with the Merci Simone group.

programme.title: Elles - EP 2
programme.desc: In Mexico, Sarahmee goes climbing with the Escaladoras Mexicanas group who introduce girls to the sport. She raps with the artists of I.M YONI, who campaign for women to excel in the music industry. She meets the Mujeres de la tierra, women farmers united against violence.

programme.title: Carbone - EP 7
programme.desc: Whilst Hydro-Quebec dreams of doubling its production by 2050, to meet the ever-increasing demand for energy, part of the solution lies within our own homes.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Mise Au Point - EP 13
programme.desc: The best reports from ''Mise au Point'', the programme that takes a fresh look at national and international news events. Through its exclusive investigations and in-depth reports, ''Mise au Point'' tackles a wide range of topics: politics, economics, social issues, sports, culture and new trends.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Chine, Les Grands Maitres De L'art - EP 5
programme.desc: Yan Gongda embodies the excellence of contemporary Chinese calligraphy. Heir to a long line of artists, he combines technical rigour and freedom of expression in a deeply spiritual practice.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 5
programme.desc: In Calvados, Syra and Bernard chose to change their lives to start organic market gardening. They grow vegetables while preserving the soil and biodiversity. Part of the production is processed on site and sold directly.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !
programme.desc: Every Friday, journalists from the French-language media and TV5MONDE's partner channels share their views on current affairs.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Capitaine Tonus - EP 7
programme.desc: How to eat well, move well, sleep well? In each episode, Captain Stella Tonus of the Body Fleet Federation journeys inside the human body aboard the vessel Positron. Her aim: to teach children about the beneficial or harmful effects of the things they do in their everyday lives.

programme.title: Capitaine Tonus - EP 8
programme.desc: How to eat well, move well, sleep well? In each episode, Captain Stella Tonus of the Body Fleet Federation journeys inside the human body aboard the vessel Positron. Her aim: to teach children about the beneficial or harmful effects of the things they do in their everyday lives.

programme.title: Capitaine Tonus - EP 9
programme.desc: How to eat well, move well, sleep well? In each episode, Captain Stella Tonus of the Body Fleet Federation journeys inside the human body aboard the vessel Positron. Her aim: to teach children about the beneficial or harmful effects of the things they do in their everyday lives.

programme.title: La Famille Blaireau-Renard - EP 51
programme.desc: Edmond is the father of three little badger cubs; all living happily in their sett. One day, he falls in love with Marguerite, a fox! Everything changes when Marguerite and her daughter move into the den; both families now have to find a way to live together in harmony!

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 24
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 29
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 15
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 13
programme.desc: Every four years, the best athletes in the animal kingdom gather at the Coubertin Fountain for their own version of the Winter Olympics. Fox, Sheep, She-Wolf, Mouse: they'll all be challenging one another in a series of sporting events in the hope of winning a medal.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 15
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 16
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 22
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 3
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 13
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Kassa Le Messager - EP 25
programme.desc: At his grandfather's request, Kassa heads off on a mission to discover the culture and history of thirteen African countries.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Femmes De Science - EP 2
programme.desc: With a PhD in bioinformatics, Salome Nashed received the L'Oreal Young Talents Award in 2022. She is also a postdoctoral fellow at the National Museum of Natural History (Paris).

programme.title: Ma Vie Avec L'ia - EP 6
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: Falo - EP 9
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo - EP 21
programme.desc: For the first time in history, the ounce of gold surpassed the $5,000 mark, benefiting from its status as a safe haven in the face of geopolitical, trade and monetary uncertainties. This sharp rise is tempting thieves...

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 10
programme.desc: In Montreux, we visit a magnificent villa on the lake. In Jurg Duchilio's home, every inch of the house is decorated with mosaics, stones and lots of paint - a home decorated in Tuscan style.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 80
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 12
programme.desc: Fleeing the war in Lebanon, Alan Geaam takes refuge in France where he gradually makes a place for himself in the restaurant industry. Today a starred chef, he tells how cooking allows him to transmit his Lebanese heritage and overcome trials, turning them into gastronomic successes.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 77
programme.desc: The President of the French Tennis Federation, Gilles Moretton, shares his vision of French tennis: the projects he has initiated, his future plans, particularly around padel, the training of young talents, the role of clubs, and major events such as Roland-Garros and the Davis Cup.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Papilles - EP 27
programme.desc: Breton chef Patrick Raingeard knows precisely the meaning of the word ''transmission,'' his career steeped in the teachings of Jacques Maximin and Alain Passard. After conquering the Cote d'Azur, he now passes the torch to his son in Contes, in the Nice hinterland.

programme.title: Hep Taxi ! - EP 13
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Refuges De Montagne - Hiver - EP 1
programme.desc: The Trift mountain hut has been hit by an avalanche: time for the Naue family to roll up their sleeves. At the Brunni, Covid-19 means a difficult start to the season for Irene and Livia Cotting. At the Lobhorn, comfort is basic: Irene Beck Tamang wants to install running water.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: Here in his Finistere, he makes mere materials ''sing''. The sculptor Adrien Coroller reveals his art and his taste for the nature whose beauty he captures and transfigures.

programme.title: Les Rencontres Du Papotin - EP 5
programme.desc: A magazine programme with a difference, along similar lines to the newspaper ''Le Papotin'', with an editorial team of young non-professional journalists on the autism spectrum. For each programme a well-known figure is subjected to a no-holds-barred interview. The rules are simple: anything can be said and anything can happen!

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 22
programme.desc: In Angers, in a 12th-century building, discover tapestries by Jean Lurcat alongside ancient textile works. The world of designer Alix Waline unfolds on both a small and large scale. At the Chateau de Versailles, Jacquemus pays tribute to his family's farming roots. Alain Ellouz transcends light through stone.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 10
programme.desc: On the menu: no-bake soft bars, fridge porridge, take-away porridge, quick quesadilla, sweet and sour omelette.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 4
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Sages & Rebelles
programme.desc: In Quebec, despite rapidly-increasing demand and the profession now having been legal for some twenty years, access to the services of a midwife remains limited. Claudie Simard discovers the little-known everyday life of these health professionals and looks into the options for giving birth offered to Quebec's women.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 8
programme.desc: Here in his Finistere, he makes mere materials ''sing''. The sculptor Adrien Coroller reveals his art and his taste for the nature whose beauty he captures and transfigures.

programme.title: Rugby - Tournoi Des Six Nations 2026 - EP 4
programme.desc: 2026 Six Nations Championship. Murrayfield Stadium (Edinburgh). 1st half.

programme.title: Rugby - Tournoi Des Six Nations 2026 - EP 4
programme.desc: 2026 Six Nations Championship. Murrayfield Stadium (Edinburgh). 2nd half.

programme.desc: The Puerto Rico Open is the only PGA Tour tournament on the island and the first in the Caribbean. It was first played in 2008. The tournament is played at the Coco Beach Golf Course. programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 30
programme.desc: This week, Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch catches up with Owen Hargreaves for the Big Interview. In this in-depth conversation the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park. The Premier League winner opens up about his early life in the Netherlands, the people in his life that have inspired him on and off the pitch, and gives us a tactical deep dive into his role on the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 40
programme.desc: We mark International Women's Day by celebrating the women shaping refereeing across the professional game. We explore the past, present and future of officiating, spending a day on the road with PGMO officials Natalie Aspinall, Kirsty Dowle and Emily Carney as they open up about their journeys to the top of the game.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 27
programme.desc: Nine years ago, Tijjani Reijnders was stacking shelves at a local supermarket. Now, after lighting up Serie A with AC Milan, the Dutch international is making a name for himself with Manchester City in the Premier League. This week, The Big Interview sits down with Reijnders to discuss his journey from Zwolle in the Netherlands to the Etihad via AZ Alkmaar and the San Siro.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 36
programme.desc: In the heart of Ecuador, we sit down with Antonio Valencia as he reflects on an extraordinary journey from humble beginnings to the grand stages of world football. Against the backdrop of the streets and stadiums that shaped him, he recounts his rise through adversity, his explosive emergence in the Premier League with Wigan, and his evolution into a title-winning, Champions League-chasing leader at Manchester United.

programme.title: MATCH HIGHLIGHTS 25/26 MW29 Newcastle United v Manchester United
programme.desc: Each Premier League game from the 2025/26 season condensed into an individual 26-minute highlights show.

programme.title: PL MOMENTS - EP 10
programme.desc: Michael Owen is the latest guest in the PL Moments hotseat as he chooses the top ten days from his Premier League career.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 29
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 30
programme.desc: This week, Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch catches up with Owen Hargreaves for the Big Interview. In this in-depth conversation the pair discuss football, identity and the craft of playing in the middle of the park. The Premier League winner opens up about his early life in the Netherlands, the people in his life that have inspired him on and off the pitch, and gives us a tactical deep dive into his role on the pitch.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 11
programme.desc: Whether it was for club or country, Stuart Pearce was one of English football's greatest servants, with a reputation as a fiercely uncompromising defender. Pearce looks back at some of the highs and lows of a playing career that took him from Nottingham Forest to Newcastle, West Ham, and Manchester City, who he would then go on to manage in memorable fashion.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 29
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 17
programme.desc: Maya Yoshida quietly became one of the Premier League's most dependable defenders during his years at Southampton, but his influence reached far beyond the pitch. In this episode, we look back at Yoshida's journey from Japan to England's top-flight, his role as a leader for club and country, and the cultural bridge he helped build along the way.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Nottingham Forest (MW29) - EP 288
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 16 of their last 19 Premier League home games (D2 L1), at least three more than any other side since April 2025.

programme.title: Fulham vs West Ham United (MW29) - EP 287
programme.desc: West Ham won six of their first eight away Premier League games against Fulham between 2001-02 and 2010-11, but they have won just two of their last seven since (D2 L3).

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Crystal Palace (MW29) (Live) - EP 290
programme.desc: Tottenham have lost six of their last seven home league London derbies (W1), including four of their five this season. Indeed, those four defeats are already their most home London derby losses in a single league campaign.

programme.desc: Newcastle have lost each of their last three Premier League home games, last losing more consecutively at St James’ Park between August and October 2018 (5).

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A qualifying round in Pittsburgh's Carrie Furnace features the Snake Crossing and Wind Chimes obstacles.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Edison Miranda vs. Willie Gibbs
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Super Middleweights Edison Miranda (26-2, 23 KOs) vs. Willie 'The Gladiator' Gibbs (20-1, 16 KOs) from the Miccosukee Indian Gaming Resort in Miami, Florida, USA. Bonus coverage includes Jason Litzau, aka 'The American Boy' (20-1, 18 KOs) vs. Jose Hernandez (21-3, 13 KOs).

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Jermain Taylor vs. Jeff Lacy
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former Middleweight Champion Jermain 'Bad Intentions' Taylor (27-2, 17 KOs) in a back and forth battle with Jeff "Left Hook' Lacy (24-1, 17 KOs) in a WBC Super Middleweight Title Eliminator on November 15, 2008 from the Vanderbilt University Memorial Gymnasium in Nashville, Tennessee, USA.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Jose Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending his NABF welterweight title against Jose Miguel Cotto, Alvarez's final bout before rising through the ranks and championships of the WBC. Also on the card, a heavyweight kickboxing clash between Errol Zimmerman vs. Rico Verhoeven.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Goeido, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Kotoeko from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Matthew Macklin
programme.desc: This episode features an undisputed middleweight title fight between Sergio Martinez and Matthew Macklin, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 8

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Zim's weather balloons have gone missing and Mayor Oki's weather forecasts are completely wrong. Messy, Zoom and Zim must fly through the skies to track the balloons down.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Tao can't go on with his circus performance, so there are going to be some disappointed fans, unless Bo agrees to do all the acts for him - with some help from Mojo's tops!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 18
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 41
programme.desc: Glitch plunges the sea into darkness in a night-time adventure near the Isles of Scilly.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo run a crazy "Hotel" with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum must get Bluey and Bingo out the door in time for a playdate, but they can't leave before they finish their game - waiting for a sticky rubber gecko to drop from the ceiling.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 28
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to North America to discover the creatures living in the wild spaces between crops. Along the way, they meet some bobwhite quails.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It drops into the Ice Disco, giving Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.desc: Norrie is running late to Squirrel Club, so Duggee teaches the squirrels what a commute is - a journey that can take you from home to learn, work or play.

programme.desc: The Squirrels see Duggee reading about wise animals and wish to learn more about what it means to be wise.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 24
programme.desc: The Squirrels hear a strange sound that they've not heard before, so they ask Duggee to help identify it.

programme.desc: Glitch's bath time puts the creatures of Puerto Rico's Bioluminescent Bay in bubble-trouble.

programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'monkey' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of monkeys - a furry monkey, a swinging monkey, a jumping monkey and a funky monkey!

programme.desc: Farmer Fuddle's chickens have escaped. Their feathers make Vivienne Volcano very itchy, so Messy has to find a way to scratch her itches and round up the chickens

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 21
programme.desc: It's pumpkin-picking day at Jackson's farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out what's going on, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.desc: Loveable Duggee and the Squirrels return with more educational fun.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 19

programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 42
programme.desc: Uh oh! Glitch accidently uses his size-ray to shrink the Go Jetters and Ubercorn so that they are the size of ants!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Bluey is struggling to learn how to ride her bike. But as she and Dad watch her friends determination with their own tasks, Bluey is inspired to give it another try.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 14

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.desc: When Marshall decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol, the pups jump into action to bring him back! // When the pups find a stowaway on their trip to the Icy Tundra, they must rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat!

After that, he was no longer the prettiest beast in Tinga Tinga. Tales from Africa.

programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere drops the kids off in Brazil and leaves to go on her own important mission, but things immediately go south for Tony and his crew. When the hauler and gear gets caught in quicksand, Tony needs to learn that a good leader knows when to accept help.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Tag wants to do something special for her Mom and Paw’s anniversary, so she recreates the boat cruise where her parents first met. \ Tag discovers that nothing is planned for Pawston’s 100th birthday, so she decides the town needs to rebuild the old Bonestand for a big Pawston concert.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: When the trees start losing their leaves, Phoebe begins knitting the trees in the park sweaters, but when the neighborhood kids see the sweaters they think they're a mysterious "Yarn Fairy," and they want to see her in action, making it much harder for the Dews to put more sweaters on the latest trees that have lost their leaves.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When "something" starts snatching things and causing havoc in Marcus' house, Phoebe and the Dew Drops investigate only to find that it's a stray kitten that they need to catch and find a home for before Marcus returns home. And now she’s going to be late to her own surprise tea party!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 9

Team Zenko must help Rodney face his fear of the dark so he can get the last picture for his collection.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 10

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! With Boss Baby’s cover at stake, it’s up to the Templeton Family to get Benji out of their hair as he sniffs around for a case that could garner the attention from federal law enforcement.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 72

With Crispin having booked her for a seemingly endless stay, Tina is trapped in a paradise nightmare, and in a tunnel of madness starts to think that she may even be Crispin.

programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 64

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 65

But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 52
programme.desc: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 1
programme.desc: When a Librarian from 200 years ago reappears today, he brings back to life a long-closed magical library and accidentally resurrects an evil Drekavac.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 2
programme.desc: Our newly assembled Librarians crew investigates a mysterious dancing sickness, leading them to a showdown with a powerful magical factioneer at a professional ballet company.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 3
programme.desc: Half of the Librarian team gets trapped on a runaway ghost train; can the rest of the team help in solving the unresolved business of the ghosts on board before the train completes a rampage of destruction?

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 4
programme.desc: The Librarians head to Paris after a string of robberies leaves mysteriously lovestruck victims in their wake. When they learn that a magical love artefact is behind the thefts, they enlist help from Vikram's old friend -- Cupid himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 5
programme.desc: The team goes to a college campus with a world-class observatory to discover who is using the Crystal of Dr. John Dee to steal people's memories, in order to own the future.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 6
programme.desc: When the magic door reroutes Charlie, Lysa and Connor to a bizarre manor where a series of Agatha Christie-style murders take place, they must figure out whodunit, while Vikram tries to track them down with the help of a mysterious tarot card reader.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 7
programme.desc: Connor is forced to reconnect with people from his pre-Library life, and must defeat an old adversary who has grown powerful in his absence.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 8
programme.desc: After a wild bachelorette party with Lysa's childhood best friend, the team wakes up in rough shape and hungover, with no idea how they ended up where they are.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 9
programme.desc: While on a visit to a small-town festival, Connor encounters the very first vampire, and finds himself fighting the clock to save himself from turning into one.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 10
programme.desc: When Vikram attempts to return to 1847 (via a homemade time machine), he inadvertently travels the entire team back to the days of King Arthur, where they learn the truth about a Knight of the Round Table, Camelot, and ... Elaine.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 11
programme.desc: When graffiti starts coming to life and threatening a teenage girl, the team have to work out how these strange events are related to Gregor's Hammer -- and the imminent return of Gregor himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 12
programme.desc: General Gregor retrieves the Sword of Mars and uses it to take over the country of Caucasylvia (remember from the Train episode), gaining control of their nuclear arsenal. The team must steal the Sword to prevent world calamity.

programme.desc: Half of the Librarian team gets trapped on a runaway ghost train; can the rest of the team help in solving the unresolved business of the ghosts on board before the train completes a rampage of destruction?

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 4
programme.desc: The Librarians head to Paris after a string of robberies leaves mysteriously lovestruck victims in their wake. When they learn that a magical love artefact is behind the thefts, they enlist help from Vikram's old friend -- Cupid himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 5
programme.desc: The team goes to a college campus with a world-class observatory to discover who is using the Crystal of Dr. John Dee to steal people's memories, in order to own the future.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 6
programme.desc: When the magic door reroutes Charlie, Lysa and Connor to a bizarre manor where a series of Agatha Christie-style murders take place, they must figure out whodunit, while Vikram tries to track them down with the help of a mysterious tarot card reader.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 7
programme.desc: Connor is forced to reconnect with people from his pre-Library life, and must defeat an old adversary who has grown powerful in his absence.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 8
programme.desc: After a wild bachelorette party with Lysa's childhood best friend, the team wakes up in rough shape and hungover, with no idea how they ended up where they are.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 9
programme.desc: While on a visit to a small-town festival, Connor encounters the very first vampire, and finds himself fighting the clock to save himself from turning into one.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 10
programme.desc: When Vikram attempts to return to 1847 (via a homemade time machine), he inadvertently travels the entire team back to the days of King Arthur, where they learn the truth about a Knight of the Round Table, Camelot, and ... Elaine.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 11
programme.desc: When graffiti starts coming to life and threatening a teenage girl, the team have to work out how these strange events are related to Gregor's Hammer -- and the imminent return of Gregor himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 12
programme.desc: General Gregor retrieves the Sword of Mars and uses it to take over the country of Caucasylvia (remember from the Train episode), gaining control of their nuclear arsenal. The team must steal the Sword to prevent world calamity.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 1
programme.desc: When a Librarian from 200 years ago reappears today, he brings back to life a long-closed magical library and accidentally resurrects an evil Drekavac.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 3
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 36
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC’s "Worldwide Exchange" delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Morgan Brennan, the program prepares CNBC’s worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action.

programme.title: US Squawk Box - EP 1
programme.desc: "Squawk Box" is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Asia Today
programme.desc: Asia Today highlights the latest news and social developments across Asia. Correspondents in over a dozen countries report on the region’s top stories as they happen. Analysts bring Asian perspective to topical and developing issues. Asia Today also emphasizes the diverse cultures and lifestyles of the world’s most populous continent.

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Assignment Asia
programme.desc: Assignment Asia is a current affairs program that takes an in-depth look at stories from all over Asia. The show focuses on people. It puts the spotlight on issues affecting the region through interviews with and first-person accounts of ordinary people with extraordinary stories.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China’s rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country’s culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Unsolved Cases "File 13: Tokyo Kabukicho Building Fire" (R)
programme.desc: NHK Special's iconic series "Unsolved Cases" becomes a standalone program! Through in-depth investigations, the series explores a wide range of cases-from historic incidents that shook society to mysterious local crimes that cast long shadows over communities, both in Japan and abroad. Each episode reveals the enduring impact of these cases on contemporary society and uncovers valuable lessons for the future.

programme.title: Jules Verne's Dreams: The World in X Years (R)
programme.desc: Jules Verne once said, "Anything one man can imagine, other men can make real." _x000D_Scientists today carry that spirit forward as they imagine the future and work to realize it. This time, they take on ‘weather control’-from kilometer‑wide ocean curtains to giant wind turbines and missions that dive into super typhoons. Ideas once thought to be mere fantasy are now beginning to take real shape in the laboratory.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep.50
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Unsolved Cases "File 13: Tokyo Kabukicho Building Fire" (R)
programme.desc: NHK Special's iconic series "Unsolved Cases" becomes a standalone program! Through in-depth investigations, the series explores a wide range of cases-from historic incidents that shook society to mysterious local crimes that cast long shadows over communities, both in Japan and abroad. Each episode reveals the enduring impact of these cases on contemporary society and uncovers valuable lessons for the future.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 8 (R)
programme.desc: The 65th historical drama unfolds in the heart of the Sengoku era, portraying the miraculous story of the Toyotomi brothers, whose unbreakable bond lifted them from obscurity to achieve the extraordinary feat of unifying a nation. Toyotomi Hidenaga (Nakano Taiga), the younger brother of Japan’s great unifier Hideyoshi (Ikematsu Sosuke), was regarded as the greatest aide of the Sengoku era-many believed that the Toyotomi reign might have endured had he lived longer.

programme.title: Hot Springs Loved by Feudal Warlords "BROTHERS IN ARMS"
programme.desc: Hot springs played a vital role in the lives of many feudal warlords-including Toyotomi Hidenaga, the protagonist of the historical drama BROTHERS IN ARMS, as well as Ishida Mitsunari and Maeda Toshiie. What life-changing experiences did each of them have there? This program explores the hot springs connected to these figures and the stories behind them.

programme.title: NHK Amateur Singing Contest Championship 2026 (R)

This program listens closely to the voices of people who continue to live with their memories and the enduring bond they feel with those they lost.

programme.title: Jules Verne's Dreams: The World in X Years (R)
programme.desc: Jules Verne once said, "Anything one man can imagine, other men can make real." _x000D_Scientists today carry that spirit forward as they imagine the future and work to realize it. This time, they take on ‘weather control’-from kilometer‑wide ocean curtains to giant wind turbines and missions that dive into super typhoons. Ideas once thought to be mere fantasy are now beginning to take real shape in the laboratory.

programme.title: NHK & YUZU: A Song Carried Forward (R)
programme.desc: Yuzu creates and performs NHK’s "Disaster Legacy Song" marking 15 years since the Great East Japan Earthquake: Ikue. This special program follows the duo behind the scenes-from their journey through Tohoku in search of inspiration to the creative struggles they face while shaping the song. What emotions and reflections does Yuzu ultimately pour into this piece?

programme.title: Glaciers
programme.desc: Glaciers possess a very special kind of "power." They have acted as a catalyst for the birth and evolution of life on Earth. Glaciers are the source of human life and one of the most important partners in the Earth's climate system. However, due to global warming, glaciers are gradually disappearing. What, then, is happening to glaciers? This documentary explores what we must do to prevent the disappearance of glaciers, which may threaten the future of the Earth.

programme.title: Hong Kong: Never Too Small
programme.desc: This show explores the ingenuity and resilience of Hong Kong residents living in compact homes. From high-tech "nano-flats" to creatively renovated old apartments, we go behind closed doors to reveal clever storage hacks, breathtaking interior designs and more.

programme.title: Music Money Monster
programme.desc: Music Money Monster challenges ordinary people and celebrities to battle through live singing stages judged solely by a real‑time AI pitch and beat analyzer, turning flawless intonation into instant cash rewards for players and viewers!

programme.title: J Music 2026
programme.desc: In each episode, popular singers are invited as guests, and they select their favourite works, performing with the live band to share their music with fans.

programme.title: You Are Not Alone Again & You Are Not Alone in A.I.
programme.desc: Host Spencer Leung returns with a new series of this supernatural-themed show, featuring guests who share real ghost stories and reveal hidden rituals and spiritual secrets, while bringing viewers live interactions filled with both chills and surprises.

programme.title: News Roundup
programme.desc: A round-up of the news before the day ends.

programme.title: ChatSAT
programme.desc: Teenagers are keen on trends. Stepping into the era of technology, they are particularly interested in emerging electronic products and popular media. Our hosts collect the newest information from all over the world, sharing their discoveries with viewers each week.

programme.title: Golden City
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.
